constitution.purpose: organizational invariants, composition, and amendment boundaries

doctrine.purpose: purpose, conduct, authority, evidence, incentives, and decision rules

identity.purpose: actors, roles, authority, delegation, incentives, and privacy

project.purpose: bounded operating context, sources, decisions, risks, and continuity

skills.purpose: reusable procedures with verification and failure handling

knowledge.purpose: claims, sources, evidence, uncertainty, contradictions, and known unknowns

models.purpose: dated model evidence, capability requirements, and routing policy

agents.purpose: software-actor composition, permissions, prompts, evaluations, and attachments

living-knowledge.purpose: governed maintenance for frequently changing knowledge corpora

meta.purpose: audit, drift review, failure learning, revision, and retirement
